global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a gameplay interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join the app with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Gameplay interface
elements.description: A rectangular area displaying a simplified gameplay interface with circular buttons and a play arrow.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: The logo 'GlitchWave' appears in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Book now' in a contrasting color, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: No ads message
elements.description: Text stating 'No ads in first week' positioned below the main call to action, emphasizing a promotional offer.

elements.label: Join the arena message
elements.description: The phrase 'Join the arena' is displayed prominently, inviting users to engage with the app.

elements.label: Circular buttons
elements.description: Several circular buttons are arranged in the gameplay interface, adding a decorative and functional element.

elements.label: Play arrow
elements.description: A small play arrow icon is positioned to indicate interactivity within the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Additional icon
elements.description: An additional small icon or element that is not clearly defined, adding complexity to the design.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: A small area that may contain additional text or information, enhancing the overall message.

elements.label: Additional gameplay element
elements.description: Another gameplay-related element that contributes to the overall interface design.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: A small area that may contain additional text or information, enhancing the overall message.

elements.label: Main promotional message
elements.description: The main headline 'Join the arena' is bold and eye-catching, designed to attract user attention.
elements.text_content: Join the arena No ads in first week

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller button labeled 'Book now' positioned at the bottom, encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: The logo 'GlitchWave' appears in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the gameplay interface in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Join the arena, No ads in first week, Book now, GlitchWave, UGC
